attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)
    
        The image of the scene has been provided.
        Please first analyze the image and then generate the PDDL problem.
        
    The robot is initially not at any object's location. It needs to first go to a location to interact with an object. If an object A can hold another object B, it is a receptacle and must be recognized as such.
    Instruction: Put a chilled potato on the island.
    

SCENE CAPTION:
Scene Description:

The scene is set in a kitchen environment with a central island countertop, a refrigerator, and a microwave. The goal is to place a chilled potato on the island.

1. Objects and their types:
   - Receptacles: 
     - The refrigerator (a large dark brown unit with a digital display and magnets on its door) is a receptacle and is openable.
     - The microwave (black, with a digital display showing "07" and a glass door) is a receptacle and is openable.
     - The island countertop is not explicitly defined as a receptacle in the domain, but objects are placed on it; for planning purposes, it can be treated as a surface for placing objects, though not a receptacle per the domain types.
   - Objects:
     - A potato (small, round, dark brown) is on the island countertop.
     - A knife (yellow handle, silver blade) is on the island countertop.
     - A loaf of bread (brown crust, rectangular) is on the island.
     - A green round vegetable (possibly a brussels sprout or small cabbage) is on the island.
     - A small brown bowl is on the island.
     - A silver bottle with a brown cap is on the island.
     - A black tray is on the countertop next to the microwave.

2. Quantities:
   - 1 refrigerator (receptacle)
   - 1 microwave (receptacle)
   - 1 potato (object)
   - 1 knife (object)
   - 1 loaf of bread (object)
   - 1 green vegetable (object)
   - 1 brown bowl (object)
   - 1 silver bottle (object)
   - 1 black tray (object)

3. Spatial relationships:
   - The potato is on the island countertop.
   - The knife is on the island countertop, near the potato.
   - The refrigerator is located to the left of the island (as seen from the perspective of the island), with wooden flooring around it.
   - The microwave is on a separate countertop to the right of the island, with white tiled backsplash behind it.
   - The black tray is on the countertop next to the microwave.

4. Current state of objects relevant to the task:
   - The potato is currently not chilled (isCool predicate is false).
   - The refrigerator is closed (opened predicate is false).
   - The microwave is not in use (isOn is false, isToggled is false).
   - The knife is not being held (holdsAny is false for the agent).
   - The agent is not at any object’s location initially.

5. Visual properties:
   - The potato is small, round, and dark brown.
   - The knife has a yellow handle and a silver blade.
   - The refrigerator is dark brown with a digital display and has magnets (a smiley face and a photo) on its door.
   - The microwave is black with a glass door and a digital display showing “07”.
   - The island countertop is brown with a speckled pattern.
   - The flooring is wooden planks, running horizontally in the view.

To achieve the goal of putting a chilled potato on the island, the robot must first pick up the potato, go to the refrigerator, open it, put the potato inside to chill it, then retrieve it and place it back on the island. The potato must be chilled (isCool true) before being placed on the island.

Based on the above scene caption, the images, and the instruction, generate the PDDL problem file.
Use the caption to understand what objects are present and their current state.
Make sure the PDDL problem accurately reflects the scene described in the caption.

Generate the PDDL problem:
attempts.response:
```pddl
(define (problem put_chilled_potato_on_island)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        refrigerator - fridge
        microwave - microwave
        potato - object
        knife - knife
        bread - object
        green_vegetable - object
        bowl - object
        bottle - object
        tray - object
        island - object  ; treated as a location/surface, not a receptacle per domain
    )
    (:init
        (openable refrigerator)
        (not (opened refrigerator))
        (openable microwave)
        (not (opened microwave))
        (not (isCool potato))
        (not (isHot potato))
        (not (isClean potato))
        (not (isSliced potato))
        (not (isOn microwave))
        (not (isToggled microwave))
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 refrigerator))
        (not (atLocation agent1 microwave))
        (not (atLocation agent1 potato))
        (not (atLocation agent1 knife))
        (not (atLocation agent1 bread))
        (not (atLocation agent1 green_vegetable))
        (not (atLocation agent1 bowl))
        (not (atLocation agent1 bottle))
        (not (atLocation agent1 tray))
        (not (atLocation agent1 island))
        ; Objects are on the island initially
        (atLocation potato island)
        (atLocation knife island)
        (atLocation bread island)
        (atLocation green_vegetable island)
        (atLocation bowl island)
        (atLocation bottle island)
        ; Tray is on countertop next to microwave
        (atLocation tray microwave)
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle potato island)  ; potato is on the island
        (isCool potato)              ; potato is chilled
    ))
)
```
attempts.problem:
(define (problem put_chilled_potato_on_island)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        refrigerator - fridge
        microwave - microwave
        potato - object
        knife - knife
        bread - object
        green_vegetable - object
        bowl - object
        bottle - object
        tray - object
        island - object  ; treated as a location/surface, not a receptacle per domain
    )
    (:init
        (openable refrigerator)
        (not (opened refrigerator))
        (openable microwave)
        (not (opened microwave))
        (not (isCool potato))
        (not (isHot potato))
        (not (isClean potato))
        (not (isSliced potato))
        (not (isOn microwave))
        (not (isToggled microwave))
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 refrigerator))
        (not (atLocation agent1 microwave))
        (not (atLocation agent1 potato))
        (not (atLocation agent1 knife))
        (not (atLocation agent1 bread))
        (not (atLocation agent1 green_vegetable))
        (not (atLocation agent1 bowl))
        (not (atLocation agent1 bottle))
        (not (atLocation agent1 tray))
        (not (atLocation agent1 island))
        ; Objects are on the island initially
        (atLocation potato island)
        (atLocation knife island)
        (atLocation bread island)
        (atLocation green_vegetable island)
        (atLocation bowl island)
        (atLocation bottle island)
        ; Tray is on countertop next to microwave
        (atLocation tray microwave)
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle potato island)  ; potato is on the island
        (isCool potato)              ; potato is chilled
    ))
)

SCENE CAPTION:
The scene is a kitchen environment with several objects placed on a brown speckled countertop (referred to as the "island") and adjacent appliances. The floor is made of brown wooden planks.

**Objects and Types:**

- **Receptacles:**
  - *Fridge*: A tall, dark brown refrigerator with a digital display and a water dispenser on the front. It is openable. It has a yellow smiley face magnet, a photo, and a watermelon slice magnet on its door. It is positioned against the wall, to the right of the island.
  - *Microwave*: A black microwave oven sitting on the countertop to the right of the island. It has a glass door and a control panel with a digital display showing "02". It is openable.
  - *Sink*: Not visible in the provided images. However, based on the domain, it is a receptacle.

- **Objects:**
  - *Potato*: A small, round, dark brown object sitting on the island. It is visually distinct from the green brussels sprout. It is currently on the countertop.
  - *Brussels Sprout*: A green, leafy vegetable on the island, to the right of the potato.
  - *Bread*: A loaf of brown bread in a plastic bag, positioned on the left side of the island.
  - *Knife*: A yellow-handled knife standing upright on the island, between the bread and the potato.
  - *Cup*: A small, brown, wooden-style cup on the island, to the right of the brussels sprout.
  - *Salt Shaker*: A silver shaker with a brown top, located behind the bread on the island.
  - *Agent*: A robotic agent is present but not visually depicted. It is initially not at any object's location.

**Quantities:**

- 1 Fridge
- 1 Microwave
- 1 Potato
- 1 Brussels Sprout
- 1 Loaf of Bread
- 1 Knife
- 1 Cup
- 1 Salt Shaker
- 1 Agent

**Spatial Relationships:**

- The *potato* is on the *island* (countertop).
- The *knife* is on the *island*, next to the *potato*.
- The *bread* is on the *island*, to the left of the *potato*.
- The *brussels sprout* is on the *island*, to the right of the *potato*.
- The *cup* is on the *island*, to the right of the *brussels sprout*.
- The *salt shaker* is on the *island*, behind the *bread*.
- The *microwave* is on the countertop, adjacent to the *island*.
- The *fridge* is against the wall, to the right of the *island* and *microwave*.

**Current State of Objects (Relevant to Planning):**

- The *potato* is not currently chilled, sliced, heated, or cleaned.
- The *fridge* is not currently opened (as per the domain, it must be opened to place objects inside).
- The *microwave* is not currently opened or turned on.
- The *knife* is on the countertop and not being held.
- The *agent* is not holding any object and is not at any specific location.

**Visual Properties:**

- The *potato* is small and dark brown, round.
- The *knife* has a yellow handle and a silver blade.
- The *bread* is in a clear plastic bag, showing the brown crust.
- The *brussels sprout* is green and has a textured, leafy surface.
- The *cup* is brown and appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material.
- The *salt shaker* is metallic silver with a brown top.
- The *fridge* is dark brown with a glossy finish and has magnets on its door.
- The *microwave* is black with a glass door and a digital display.

The goal is to place a chilled potato on the island. This requires the agent to first go to the potato, pick it up, go to the fridge, open it, put the potato inside to chill it, close the fridge, retrieve the chilled potato, and then place it back on the island. The knife is present but not needed for this specific task.

Use the caption to understand what objects are present and their current state.
Make sure the PDDL problem accurately reflects the scene described in the caption.

Generate the PDDL problem:
attempts.response:
```pddl
(define (problem put_chilled_potato_on_island)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent - agent
        fridge - fridge
        microwave - microwave
        sink - sink
        potato - object
        knife - knife
        bread - object
        brussels_sprout - object
        cup - object
        salt_shaker - object
        island - object  ; The countertop is treated as a location/object for "atLocation" and "inReceptacle" purposes.
    )
    (:init
        ; Initial locations: All objects are on the island (countertop) except appliances.
        (atLocation agent island) ; Agent starts at the island for simplicity, as it needs to interact with objects there first.
        (atLocation potato island)
        (atLocation knife island)
        (atLocation bread island)
        (atLocation brussels_sprout island)
        (atLocation cup island)
        (atLocation salt_shaker island)
        (atLocation microwave island) ; Microwave is on the countertop adjacent to the island, treated as being at the island location for movement.
        (atLocation fridge island)    ; Fridge is against the wall near the island, treated as being at the island location for movement.

        ; Receptacle properties
        (openable fridge)
        (openable microwave)
        ; Fridge is initially closed
        (not (opened fridge))
        ; Microwave is initially closed
        (not (opened microwave))

        ; Object states
        (not (isCool potato))
        (not (isHot potato))
        (not (isClean potato))
        (not (isSliced potato))
        (not (isOn microwave))
        (not (isOn fridge))

        ; Agent state
        (not (holdsAny agent))
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle potato island)
        (isCool potato)
    ))
)
```

 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)
    
        The image of the scene has been provided.

        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init

                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
